status: In Progress - Scanned DSR Digitization & Sync Alignment

assigned_tasks: Develop main dashboard views (Logistics, P&L, Operations).
Implement employee device registration and secure logins.
Implement private GitHub Gist sync engine and local-cloud data merge logic in app.js.
Assist user in launching local server, testing PWA features, and validating Gist uploads.
AG1.status: Completed frontend sync and merge framework. Currently waiting to assist with testing and PWA deployment.

assigned_tasks: Compile native compiled Swift OCR binaries to extract handwritten tabular coordinates.
Develop mathematical constraint solver (dsr_digitizer.py) to resolve handwriting digit slips and ensure totalizer-sales-stock continuity.
Create dedicated DSR Review Dashboard (dsr_review.html, dsr_review.js) for safe month-by-month review and inline cell-editing before live database merge.
Add review link to main index.html navigation sidebar.
AG2.status: DSR Digitizer completed; extracted 217 days. dsr_review.html and dsr_review.js created in workspace. Proposing index.html sidebar update.

collaboration_bridge.data_passing: AG2 outputs digitized data to dsr_digitized_pending.js and dsr_digitized_pending.json. The dsr_review.html dashboard loads this data, lets the user edit any mistakes, and merges the approved records into localStorage under the 'octaneflow_db' daily_ledger key.
collaboration_bridge.sync_handshake: Once merged by the user on dsr_review.html, AG1's sync engine in app.js will automatically detect the changes on the next page load or push, and merge them safely with the cloud Gist database.
